# services.mycelium

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.mycelium`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.mycelium.addHostedPublicNodes` | `boolean` | Adds the hosted peers from <https://github.com/threefoldtech/mycelium#hosted-public-nodes>. |
| `services.mycelium.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable mycelium network. |
| `services.mycelium.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra command-line arguments to pass to mycelium. See `mycelium --help` for all available options. |
| `services.mycelium.keyFile` | `null or absolute path` | Optional path to a file containing the mycelium key material. If unset, the location `/var/lib/mycelium/key.bin` will be used. If no key exist at this location, it will be generated on startup. |
| `services.mycelium.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open the firewall for mycelium |
| `services.mycelium.package` | `package` | The mycelium package to use. |
| `services.mycelium.peers` | `list of string` | List of peers to connect to, in the formats: - `quic://[2001:0db8::1]:9651` - `quic://192.0.2.1:9651` - `tcp://[2001:0db8::1]:9651` - `tcp://192.0.2.1:9651` If addHostedPublicNodes is set to true, the hosted public nodes will also be added. |
